title: task
description: rust/lichen-core/src/tx_queue.rs:194 - The sequence counter uses wrapping_add(1). When it wraps from u32::MAX to 0, the Ord comparison (other.sequence.cmp(&self.sequence)) will incorrectly order items: a new item with seq=0 will be dequeued before an older item with seq~u32::MAX, breaking FIFO within priority. Practically impossible to trigger (requires 4 billion+ operations with max 32-entry queue), but theoretically incorrect.
